ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #123456 has been shipped
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon. Your order #123456 has been placed on 15 April 2024 at 10:23 AM. Shipping address: 123, Main Street, Mumbai, India.

Items:
- 1x Bluetooth Speaker
- 2x USB-C Charger

Your order is now on the way. You will receive a delivery confirmation once the package is out for delivery.

If you have any questions, feel free to contact our support.

Thank you for choosing Amazon.

Best regards,
Amazon Customer Service

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Crypto Wallet Suspended – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear User,

We regret to inform you that your crypto wallet has been temporarily suspended due to suspicious activity. To restore access, please verify your identity by clicking <URL> and following the on-screen instructions.

Kripya 24 gh
